## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between GrowthX and Strike Graph for content creation and marketing strategies](https://fathom.video/share/s_v7yyL7kd7jqtr2iwaRhRx5e-sZeWDW?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Strike Graph seeks to scale content production across various verticals and regions](https://fathom.video/share/s_v7yyL7kd7jqtr2iwaRhRx5e-sZeWDW?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
  - [GrowthX specializes in high-volume, quality content creation (8+ articles/week) with AI-assisted workflows](https://fathom.video/share/s_v7yyL7kd7jqtr2iwaRhRx5e-sZeWDW?tab=summary&timestamp=1589.0)
  - [Potential alignment on expanding Strike Graph's content strategy beyond current SEO efforts](https://fathom.video/share/s_v7yyL7kd7jqtr2iwaRhRx5e-sZeWDW?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)
  - [GrowthX's approach could complement Strike Graph's existing marketing initiatives (podcast, webinars, vertical testing)](https://fathom.video/share/s_v7yyL7kd7jqtr2iwaRhRx5e-sZeWDW?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)

## Topics

### Strike Graph's Current Marketing Landscape

  - [Focused on specific verticals (DoD, medical devices, automotive)](https://fathom.video/share/s_v7yyL7kd7jqtr2iwaRhRx5e-sZeWDW?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)
  - [SEO efforts: 25 long-form pieces in the past year](https://fathom.video/share/s_v7yyL7kd7jqtr2iwaRhRx5e-sZeWDW?tab=summary&timestamp=1307.0)
  - [Weekly podcast with 1000+ viewers](https://fathom.video/share/s_v7yyL7kd7jqtr2iwaRhRx5e-sZeWDW?tab=summary&timestamp=1813.0)
  - [Webinars and industry-specific content](https://fathom.video/share/s_v7yyL7kd7jqtr2iwaRhRx5e-sZeWDW?tab=summary&timestamp=1831.0)
  - [Exploring AI tools for MDR team and lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/s_v7yyL7kd7jqtr2iwaRhRx5e-sZeWDW?tab=summary&timestamp=1873.0)

### GrowthX's Content Creation Methodology

  - [AI-assisted workflows for rapid, high-quality content production](https://fathom.video/share/s_v7yyL7kd7jqtr2iwaRhRx5e-sZeWDW?tab=summary&timestamp=1589.0)
  - [Typical engagement: 8 articles/week (50,000 words/month)](https://fathom.video/share/s_v7yyL7kd7jqtr2iwaRhRx5e-sZeWDW?tab=summary&timestamp=1589.0)
  - [Content OS: Airtable-based system for ideation and assignment management](https://fathom.video/share/s_v7yyL7kd7jqtr2iwaRhRx5e-sZeWDW?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Emphasis on repurposing content across multiple channels (SEO, email nurture, social)](https://fathom.video/share/s_v7yyL7kd7jqtr2iwaRhRx5e-sZeWDW?tab=summary&timestamp=1478.0)
  - [Focus on creating publisher-quality content engines for clients](https://fathom.video/share/s_v7yyL7kd7jqtr2iwaRhRx5e-sZeWDW?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

### Potential Collaboration Areas

  - [Scaling Strike Graph's content across various verticals and regions](https://fathom.video/share/s_v7yyL7kd7jqtr2iwaRhRx5e-sZeWDW?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
  - [Enhancing podcast and webinar content distribution](https://fathom.video/share/s_v7yyL7kd7jqtr2iwaRhRx5e-sZeWDW?tab=summary&timestamp=1941.0)
  - [Developing lead magnets and downloadable assets](https://fathom.video/share/s_v7yyL7kd7jqtr2iwaRhRx5e-sZeWDW?tab=summary&timestamp=2311.0)
  - [Exploring email marketing and outbound enablement (not direct execution)](https://fathom.video/share/s_v7yyL7kd7jqtr2iwaRhRx5e-sZeWDW?tab=summary&timestamp=2157.0)
  - [Improving overall content strategy and user experience](https://fathom.video/share/s_v7yyL7kd7jqtr2iwaRhRx5e-sZeWDW?tab=summary&timestamp=2291.0)

### GrowthX's Capabilities and Limitations

  - [Primary focus on content creation, not paid search or direct email marketing](https://fathom.video/share/s_v7yyL7kd7jqtr2iwaRhRx5e-sZeWDW?tab=summary&timestamp=2097.0)
  - [Can support sales enablement and ABM motions indirectly](https://fathom.video/share/s_v7yyL7kd7jqtr2iwaRhRx5e-sZeWDW?tab=summary&timestamp=2202.0)
  - [Ability to create comprehensive content experiences (CTAs, imagery, lead magnets)](https://fathom.video/share/s_v7yyL7kd7jqtr2iwaRhRx5e-sZeWDW?tab=summary&timestamp=2340.0)
  - [Emphasis on testing and iterating content strategies](https://fathom.video/share/s_v7yyL7kd7jqtr2iwaRhRx5e-sZeWDW?tab=summary&timestamp=1974.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX team to follow up and schedule a deeper dive meeting ("Fathom")](https://fathom.video/share/s_v7yyL7kd7jqtr2iwaRhRx5e-sZeWDW?tab=summary&timestamp=2402.0)
  - [Set up Slack channel for async communication](https://fathom.video/share/s_v7yyL7kd7jqtr2iwaRhRx5e-sZeWDW?tab=summary&timestamp=2415.0)
  - [GrowthX to send SOW (Statement of Work) for review](https://fathom.video/share/s_v7yyL7kd7jqtr2iwaRhRx5e-sZeWDW?tab=summary&timestamp=2415.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up meeting in \~2 weeks (after Mike's conference)](https://fathom.video/share/s_v7yyL7kd7jqtr2iwaRhRx5e-sZeWDW?tab=summary&timestamp=2432.0)
  - [GrowthX to prepare analysis of potential opportunities for Strike Graph](https://fathom.video/share/s_v7yyL7kd7jqtr2iwaRhRx5e-sZeWDW?tab=summary&timestamp=2291.0)
